The '''Krayt Cantina''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

[[Kyle Katarn]] was familiar with the place, and, in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], he went there to investigate leads on the [[Disciples of Ragnos|Cult of Ragnos]].

==Appearances==
